## Checklist (Definition of Done)
- [ ] Change works and is **verified** (not "should work")
- [ ] Docs updated if usage/behavior changed
- [ ] `bash tools/lint-status.sh` passes
- [ ] `shellcheck tools/*.sh setup.sh` passes (if scripts touched)
- [ ] No new dependency / required manual step (or justified below)
- [ ] Keeps the zero-dependency, cross-OS, simple ethos
